categories.title: Byliv
categories.definition: Byliv handler om det åpne og delte: gater, torg og parker; møteplasser og hverdagsbruk; bevegelse, opphold og rytmer. Her studeres byen slik den faktisk brukes – ikke bare slik den er planlagt.

categories.title: Arkitektur

topic_hooks.rotation_note: Prefer underused thinkers and rotate away from overused names when another canon thinker fits the same hook.

upgrade_notes: Expanded hook canons with additional thinkers, including more Norwegian-relevant thinkers.
Added hook-level comparison_pairs to support stronger philosopher-vs-philosopher questions.
Added preferred_question_moves so the generator can ask better theory questions without slipping into generic sociology.
Kept the original structure intact so existing generator logic remains compatible.
Added new categories and hooks for climate/health/accessibility, data/governance/smart city, housing affordability, and regional/global urban studies.
Extended Norwegian theory paths with planning, place development and housing/place research.
Prepared the curriculum for a fuller urban studies coverage beyond the classic Oslo core.
